description_long: This is a red aluminum can with the iconic Coca-Cola branding prominently displayed in white script across its curved surface. The can features a glossy finish, with a large Coca-Cola logo on one side and a stylized white bottle silhouette composed of repeated Coca-Cola text on the other. Nutritional information, recycling symbols, and product details are printed in white on the back, along with a barcode and volume indication of 330 ml. The top of the can is metallic silver, slightly recessed, and features a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The can's cylindrical shape is slightly tapered at the top and bottom, with a smooth, hard surface. There are no visible signs of damage, and the can appears unopened and intact.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, a silver pull-tab top, and detailed product information on the back. The surface is smooth, hard, and undamaged.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large, white Coca-Cola script logo dominating the red surface, with the silver top edge visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the stylized white bottle silhouette made up of repeated Coca-Cola text, with part of the product information visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays detailed nutritional information, recycling symbols, a barcode, and the 330 ml volume marking in white text.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the white bottle silhouette graphic, with the edge of the Coca-Cola logo and some product details visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white Coca-Cola script logo, white bottle silhouette graphic made of repeated Coca-Cola text, nutritional information, recycling symbols, barcode, and 330 ml volume marking, all in white on a red background.
